info.title: User-related APIs
info.description:
Quran.Foundation user-related APIs enable your app to seamlessly integrate with Quran.Foundation's user-centric features, providing access to personalized notes, bookmarks, goals, streaks, reading sessions, and more. This differentiates them from [content APIs](/docs/category/content-apis) that focus on non-user-specific resources like translations, tafsirs, and verses.

 ## How to get access 

 We are using OAuth2 flows to authenticate and authorize requests. To get started, you need to [get an access token](/docs/tutorials/oidc/getting-started-with-oauth2#obtaining-oauth-20-client-credentials) to make requests to our APIs. Then follow the steps mentioned [here](/docs/tutorials/oidc/getting-started-with-oauth2). 

 For web applications, the recommended integration pattern is backend token exchange plus backend or server-side proxy calls to User APIs. Your app can keep the user session in secure server storage or `httpOnly` cookies, while your backend injects `x-auth-token` and `x-client-id` on outbound requests to Quran.Foundation APIs.

 ## Pagination 

 We are using cursor based pagination. The pagination query params consist of `first`,`after`, `before` and `last`. 

 Example 
 - `first: 10` will give you first 10 items 
 - `first: 10, after: xyz` will give you first 10 items after the item with id `xyz` 
 - `last: 10` will give you the last 10 items 
 - `last: 10, before: xyz` will give you the last 10 items before the item with id `xyz` 

 The only possible combinations are `first + after` or `last + before`. They should not be used together

featured = 1, // Like Sticky posts, will be featured for a time period.Shown at top in feed and partner apps

promoted = 2, // High quality content.Shown at top(after featured) in feed and partner apps

normal = 3, // Default status, available in search, latest and popular tabs.In feed(if you're following the author)

hidden = 4, // Visible only to author or moderators, or via private share link.

private_note = 5, // Private notes, only visible to author or via private share link.These are the posts made "private" by moderators.

requested_review = 6, // User requested the review, treat them has hidden.Only visible to author and moderators

deleted = 30,

post.description: Add or update a bookmark by details. Omit `isReading` to create or update a regular standalone bookmark. Set `isReading=true` to set the user's singleton reading bookmark. Set `isReading=false` to unset the current reading bookmark; in that case the response `data` can be `null` if no reading bookmark was set. For Quran.com-style saved or favorite ayah bookmarks, use `POST /v1/collections/__default__/bookmarks`.

For `type=QURAN`, provide `seconds`, `ranges`, and `mushafId`. You can optionally pass `date` (YYYY-MM-DD) to backfill activity for a past day (for example when the user manually adds time). get.description: Retrieve a paginated feed of Quran Reflect posts, including reflections and lessons. Supports filtering by authors, tags, Quran references, groups, pages, and post types. Response items include engagement metadata such as `likesCount`, `commentsCount`, and `recentComment` when available. Use the dedicated comment endpoints to retrieve comment objects and totals. For ayah-by-ayah reads, use `filter[references][0][chapterId]`, `filter[references][0][from]`, and `filter[references][0][to]`, and use `filter[postTypeIds]=1` for reflections or `filter[postTypeIds]=2` for lessons.

parameters.name: tab
parameters.description: Feed tab type. `feed` shows personalized content, `trending` shows explore, and `following` shows posts from followed users.

parameters.name: languages
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of language IDs to filter posts by reflection language, for example `languages=1,2`.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (default: 1).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of posts per page (default: 20).

parameters.name: filter[verifiedOnly]
parameters.description: Whether to limit the feed to verified contributors. Public ayah-by-ayah reads typically combine this with indexed reference filters such as `filter[references][0][chapterId]`, `filter[references][0][from]`, and `filter[references][0][to]`.

parameters.name: filter[referencesOperator]
parameters.description: Operator applied to multiple Quran reference filters.

parameters.name: filter[tagsOperator]
parameters.description: Operator applied to multiple tag filters.

parameters.name: filter[postTypeIds]
parameters.description: Comma-separated Quran Reflect post type IDs. Use `1` for reflections and `2` for lessons.

parameters.name: filter[pages]
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of page subdomains to include.

parameters.name: filter[groups]
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of group URLs to include.

parameters.name: filter[references][0][to]
parameters.description: Ending ayah number for reference filter index `0`. For a single ayah, use the same value as `from`.

parameters.name: filter[references][0][from]
parameters.description: Starting ayah number for reference filter index `0`. Pair with the matching `chapterId` and `to` values.

parameters.name: filter[references][0][chapterId]
parameters.description: Reference filter example for index `0`. Use additional indices such as `filter[references][1][chapterId]` for more references.

parameters.name: filter[tags]
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tag values to include.

parameters.name: filter[authors]
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of author identifiers to include.

200.description: Feed retrieved successfully with paginated posts

get.description: Retrieve posts created by the currently authenticated user. Supports filtering by tab (MY_REFLECTIONS, SAVED, DRAFTS), sorting options, and post type filtering.

parameters.name: tab
parameters.description: Profile tab filter (default: my_reflections)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order for posts (default: latest)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of posts per page (default: 20, max: 20)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (default: 1)

parameters.name: postTypeIds
parameters.description: Array of post type IDs to filter by

200.description: User posts retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

get.description: Returns whether the authenticated user currently likes the post. This lightweight endpoint avoids loading the full post payload for simple like-state checks.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID to check liked state for

liked.description: true when the post is liked by the current user

404.description: Post not found

get.description: Retrieve a specific post by its unique numeric ID. Returns the full post with author details, tags, references, room information, and engagement metrics. Admins can view additional moderation details.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID

200.description: Post found and returned with all associated data

404.description: Post not found or has been deleted

delete.description: Soft-delete a post by marking it as removed. Only the post author or admins can delete posts. Related engagement counts (likes, comments, saves) update asynchronously via background jobs, so metrics may briefly lag.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID to delete

200.description: Post deletion accepted and queued for processing

403.description: User not authorized to delete this post

404.description: Post not found

patch.description: Update an existing post. Only the post author or admins can edit. Supports updating body, references, mentions, draft status, and room visibility settings.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID to update

requestBody.description: Partial post data to update - only include fields to change

200.description: Post updated successfully with the updated post data

403.description: User not authorized to edit this post

404.description: Post not found

get.description: Record that a post has been viewed by the current user (if authenticated). Used for analytics and engagement tracking. Does not require authentication but will track user-specific views when logged in.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID

post.description: Create a new post (reflection) with Quran references. Posts can be public, drafts, or associated with a room (group/page). Supports user mentions and multiple Quran verse references. Minimum body length is 6 characters.

requestBody.description: Post creation payload containing the post object with body, references, mentions, and visibility settings

400.description: Invalid post data - body too short, invalid references, or invalid room post status

post.description: Report a post for moderation review. Provide a reason for the report to help moderators evaluate the content. Multiple reports on the same post may trigger automatic review.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID to report

requestBody.description: Report details including reason for flagging the content

200.description: Report submitted successfully for moderation review

get.description: Retrieve public posts created by a specific user. If viewing own posts while authenticated, returns all posts including drafts. Supports sorting and filtering by post type.

parameters.description: Sort order for posts (default: latest)

post.description: Toggle like status for a post. If already liked, removes the like. If not liked, adds a like. Updates the post like count and triggers notifications.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID to like/unlike

200.description: Like status toggled - returns new state

liked.description: true if now liked, false if now unliked

post.description: Toggle save/bookmark status for a post. Saved posts appear in the SAVED tab of the user profile for easy access later.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique numeric post ID to save/unsave

200.description: Save status toggled - returns new state

saved.description: true if now saved, false if now unsaved

post.description: Generate a downloadable PDF document containing selected posts with their full content, Quran references, and author information. Ayah translations are rendered according to user language preferences.

200.description: PDF file generated and returned as binary attachment

get.description: Count how many posts the current user has written for verses within a specified Quran verse range. Useful for reading goals and progress tracking.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start verse key in format chapter:verse (e.g., "2:1")

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End verse key in format chapter:verse (e.g., "2:286")

200.description: Count of posts within the specified verse range

400.description: Invalid verse range - malformed keys or from > to

get.description: Retrieve all posts written by the current user for a specific Quran verse. This endpoint requires a user-bound token and returns only the authenticated user's own posts. It is not part of the public `client_credentials`-compatible read subset; for public ayah-by-ayah reads, use `GET /v1/posts/feed` with indexed reference filters such as `filter[references][0][chapterId]`, `filter[references][0][from]`, and `filter[references][0][to]`.

parameters.name: verseKey
parameters.description: Verse key in format chapter:verse

200.description: User posts for the specified verse

400.description: Invalid verse key format
